name: Tank War Simulator Game
description: Enter the battlefield and experience the ultimate tank warfare action in World War Tank Shooting Game. Get ready for explosive combat missions, powerful armored vehicles, and intense world war battles. This game is designed for players who love military action, tank shooting, and realistic war strategy gameplay. In this action-packed tank battle game, you take control of heavy war tanks and fight against enemy forces across dangerous battle zones. Your mission is simple: aim carefully, destroy enemy tanks, survive powerful attacks, and lead your army to victory. Each level brings new challenges, stronger opponents, and thrilling war scenario
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
